scenario.name: UAC Play and DTMF
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:ivr-test@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:ivr-test@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: IVR Test - Play and DTMF Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=ivrtest 123456 123456 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=IVR Test c=IN IP4 [local_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-16 a=sendrecv

ACK sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:ivr-test@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0

INFO sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:ivr-test@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 INFO Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Type: application/dtmf-relay Content-Length: [len]
Signal=1 Duration=160

INFO sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:ivr-test@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 3 INFO Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Type: application/dtmf-relay Content-Length: [len]
Signal=2 Duration=160

INFO sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:ivr-test@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 4 INFO Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Type: application/dtmf-relay Content-Length: [len]
Signal=* Duration=160

BYE sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:ivr-test@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 5 BYE Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
